discrepancies.explanation: PMPM: Platform $3,479.75 vs payer $1,147.60 (Δ$+2,332.15). Likely due to claims run-out timing differences and maturity adjustments. Total impact: $26,257,676.85.
discrepancies.resolution_recommendation: Compare claims included in each calculation. Check for claims adjudicated after payer's cutoff date. Review maturity adjustment methodology.
discrepancies.description: PMPM: Platform $3,479.75 vs payer $1,147.60 (Δ$+2,332.15). Likely due to claims run-out timing differences and maturity adjustments. Total impact: $26,257,676.85.

relevant_clauses.clause_text: Total cost of care shall be calculated as the sum of all Parts A and B allowed charges for attributed beneficiaries during the performance year, divided by the number of attributed beneficiary-months, expressed as a per-member-per-month (PMPM) amount. Claims with service dates within the performance year that are adjudicated within 3 months of the performance year end shall be included.
relevant_clauses.interpretation: Calculate total cost using allowed amount as the cost basis. Excluding pharmacy claims. Claims run-out window: 3 months after performance year end.

discrepancies.explanation: Shared savings: Platform $0.00 vs payer $169,420.00 (Δ$-169,420.00). This is a downstream effect of attribution, quality, and cost differences.
discrepancies.resolution_recommendation: Resolve upstream discrepancies (attribution, quality, cost) first. The settlement difference is a consequence of those inputs.
discrepancies.description: Shared savings: Platform $0.00 vs payer $169,420.00 (Δ$-169,420.00). This is a downstream effect of attribution, quality, and cost differences.

relevant_clauses.clause_text: The ACO's benchmark shall be $1,187.00 PMPM, as established by CMS based on the ACO's historical cost baseline trended forward. If the ACO's actual PMPM is below the benchmark by more than the minimum savings rate of 2.0%, the ACO shall receive 50% of the gross savings, subject to quality performance gates.
relevant_clauses.interpretation: Benchmark PMPM: $1,187.00. Minimum savings rate: 2.0%. Shared savings rate: 50%.

relevant_clauses.clause_text: The quality performance gate requires a minimum composite quality score of 40% for the ACO to be eligible for any shared savings.
relevant_clauses.interpretation: Quality gate: composite score must exceed 40% for the ACO to be eligible for shared savings.
